title: Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1: The Defense of Kamino
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Youmay|the [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperback]]|the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume One|''Star Wars: Clone Wars'' Volume One]] DVD|linebreak=1}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Kamino}} {{ComicCollection |image=[[File:Defenseofkamino.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1:
The Defense of Kamino'' |writer=Various |penciller=Various |inker=Various |letterer= |colorist=[[Brad Anderson|Joe Wayne]] |cover artist= |editor= |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[July 9]], [[2003]]{{DarkHorse|url=Books/12-539/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-1The-Defense-of-Kamino-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1 The Defense of Kamino TPB}} |other date= |media type=Trade paperback |pages=128 |isbn=9781569719626 |isbn2= |timeline=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |series=''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' |issues=*[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]] *[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] *''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]'' |preceded by= |followed by=''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 2: Victories and Sacrifices]]'' }} '''''Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1: The Defense of Kamino''''' is the first volume in the series of [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperbacks]]. Volume 1 collects ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' issues [[Republic 49|49]] and [[Republic 50|50]] as well as ''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]''. It was published by [[Dark Horse Comics]] on [[July 9]], [[2003]]. ==Publisher's summary== '''''The Clone Wars have begun! Ever since they were mentioned in the very first ''Star Wars'' film, fans have been dying to know more. ''Attack of the Clones'' offered a glimpse, but "''The Defense of Kamino''" brings the galaxy-wide conflict into full view!''''' ''Two undercover Jedi discover a Separatist plan to destroy the cloning facility on the watery world of Kamino, thus crippling the Republic's ability to maintain their clone army. Obi-Wan Kenobi and Anakin Skywalker are part of a Jedi fighter squadron sent to protect the installation, but they learn that there are heroes fighting for the Separatist cause as well as for the Republic, and that Jango Fett, though dead, still has something to say about how this war is fought! Meanwhile, Mace Windu, the leader of the Jedi Council, must deal with a rift in the Jedi ranks—a matter that reveals a Jedi traitor and a new Dark Jedi working in league with Dooku. Mace is considered one of the best swordsmen in the galaxy, but can he stand up to the swordmaster who taught him everything he knows—including the mysterious techinque known as "Vaapad"?'' ''New characters and new worlds are revealed as the Clone Wars spreads throughout the galaxy!'' ==Contents== *[[Republic 49|''Republic'' 49]] *[[Republic 50|''Republic'' 50]] *''[[Jedi: Mace Windu]]'' ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9781569719626}}; [[July 9]], [[2003]]; [[Dark Horse Comics]]; US paperback *{{ISBN|9781593075811}}; [[June 27]], [[2006]]; Dark Horse Comics; US paperback, Spanish Edition {{C|''Star Wars: La Guerra de los Clones Volumen 1: La Defensa de Kamino''}}{{DarkHorse|url=Books/13-660/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Vol-1---Defense-of-Kamino-TPB-Spanish-Edition|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Vol. 1 - Defense of Kamino TPB (Spanish Edition)}} ===Cover gallery=== File:Defenseofkamino.jpg|Cover File:CWv1-TheDefenseofKamino-wrap.jpg|Full wraparound cover File:LaGuerraDeLosClones-Vol1.jpg|Front cover, Spanish Edition File:CWV1TDOK-FC.jpg|Cover art ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{DarkHorse|url=Books/12-539/Star-Wars-Clone-Wars-Volume-1The-Defense-of-Kamino-TPB|text=Star Wars: Clone Wars Volume 1 The Defense of Kamino TPB}} {{RepublicNav}} {{Interlang |es=Las Guerras Clon Volumen 1: La Defensa de Kamino |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: კლონების ომები, ტომი 1: კამინოს დაცვა |pl=Clone Wars 1: The Defense of Kamino }} [[Category:Star Wars: Clone Wars trade paperbacks]]
